---
title: "Munich Unemployment Analysis"
format: 
  html: 
    toc: false
editor: visual
---

This project analyses unemployment trends across Munich's 25 city districts from 2000 to 2024, using open data from the [Munich Open Data Portal](https://opendata.muenchen.de).

We explore two questions:

1.  How has the unemployment percentage in Munich changed from 2000 to 2024 overall and by city area (North, East, South, West)?
2.  Do unemployment percentages differ in 2024 based on gender across all 25 districts Munich.

Read the full analysis on the [Report](report.qmd) page, the initial [Proposal](proposal.qmd) or learn more [About](about.qmd) this project.
